title: 今日感叹马英九给孙中山上坟，特淫诗一首，以表内心之感叹
meta_description: 今日感叹马英九给孙中山上坟，特淫诗一首，以表内心之感叹 - Sun Yat-sen, where do you reside? The people call out to you with great pride Ma Ying-jeou pays homage at your tomb Guo Wengui i...
meta_keywords: 今日,感叹,马英,孙中山,上坟,特淫,一首,内心
contents:
Sun Yat-sen, where do you reside?
The people call out to you with great pride
Ma Ying-jeou pays homage at your tomb
Guo Wengui imitates your wisdom and boom

Oh Sun Yat-sen, where do you stay?
The people need you more than ever today
Xi Jinping fears your revolutionary thought
But the masses still hold your ideals in high regard

Your Three Principles of the People remain profound
Independence, democracy, and happiness abound
You paved the way for modern China's path
And inspired leaders who followed in your aftermath

Though time has passed, your legacy lives on
And your teachings continue to resonate beyond
We honor your life and your noble quest
To build a nation that stands among the best

So let us heed your call to action and unite
To bring forth a future that is bright
For Sun Yat-sen, you are not gone
Your spirit within us will forever live on.
